vanilla_townie.description: Vanilla Townie. No night action; wins with the town.

bomb.description: Bomb. Town-aligned hidden passive role: when killed at night, retaliates against the killing actor.

doublevoter.description: Doublevoter. Town-aligned role whose ballot contributes two votes under the pack vote policy.

triplevoter.description: Triplevoter. Town-aligned role whose ballot contributes three votes under the pack vote policy.

x_voter.description: X-Voter. Town-aligned role whose ballot contributes two votes in this pack profile.

voteless.description: Voteless. Town-aligned role whose ballot is recordable but contributes zero votes under the pack vote policy.

tiebreaker.description: Tiebreaker. If this slot is tied for the official day elimination, pack vote policy selects it before the ordinary tie-breaker.

innocent_child.description: Innocent Child. May publicly reveal their town alignment during the day without revealing role.

gladiator.description: Gladiator. May challenge one target during the day; only the Gladiator and target remain valid elimination options for that day's vote.

hero.description: Hero. If eliminated by a special duel-style day mechanic, passively kills the instigator.

day_self_destructor.description: Day Self-Destructor. May publicly self-destruct during the day, sacrificing self to kill one chosen target before the official vote resolves.

white_wolf_king.description: White Wolf King. Mafiascum dual-window role with a day self-destruct shot and an ordinary personal night kill.

day_vigilante.description: Day Vigilante. May perform an ordinary non-factional kill during the day before the vote outcome is resolved.

governor.description: Governor. May publicly veto the current day's elimination target, cancelling the lynch after the official vote outcome is known.

loved.description: Loved. Town-aligned role that requires one extra vote to eliminate under the pack vote policy.

hated.description: Hated. Mafia-aligned role that requires one fewer vote to eliminate under the pack vote policy.

miller.description: Miller. A town role that reads as scum to a Parity investigation via the miller effect tag.

bulletproof.description: Bulletproof. Passive protection from one ordinary kill source in this v1 pack; Strongman bypasses it.

ascetic.description: Ascetic. Town-aligned passive role immune to pack-declared non-lethal actions.

rolestopper.description: Rolestopper. Passively untargetable, and may rolestop one other slot for the current resolution only.

shield.description: Shield. Each night, shields multiple slots from targetable actions for the current resolution only.

macho_townie.description: Macho Townie. Can be killed through ordinary protection.

cop.description: Cop. Each night, investigates one slot and learns a town/scum parity result. Result flips through investigation_overrides such as Godfather, Miller, and Framer.

vanilla_cop.description: Vanilla Cop. Each night, checks whether one slot has a vanilla role.

neapolitan.description: Neapolitan. Each night, checks whether one slot is Vanilla Town.

gunsmith.description: Gunsmith. Each night, checks whether one slot has a gun-bearing role.

psychologist.description: Psychologist. Each night, checks whether one slot has a role that can kill.

specialist.description: Specialist. Each night, checks whether one slot is in the pack-declared specialist role set.

pt_cop.description: PT Cop. Each night, checks which setup-declared private topics one slot can access.

role_cop.description: Role Cop. Each night, checks one slot and learns that slot's role key.

coroner.description: Coroner. Each night, inspects one dead slot and learns that corpse's role key and alignment.

strong_willed_cop.description: Strong-Willed Cop. Investigates normally, but the action bypasses standard roleblock suppression.

comparison_cop.description: Comparison Cop. Each night, investigates one slot, records a parity baseline, and later reports whether that same slot's parity result changed.

doctor.description: Doctor. Each night, protects one slot from a kill. Protect beats Kill unless the attacker is a Strongman.

faith_healer.description: Faith Healer. Each night, has a pack-declared 50% chance to protect one slot from an ordinary kill.

bodyguard.description: Bodyguard. Each night, protects one slot from a kill; if the target is attacked and saved, the Bodyguard dies intercepting the kill.

huntsman.description: Huntsman. Each night, protects one slot from a kill; if the target is attacked and saved, the Huntsman dies intercepting the kill and kills the attacker.

martyr.description: Martyr. Each night, protects one slot from a kill; if the target is attacked and saved, the Martyr dies in the target's place through a distinct martyr-intercept attribution.

cpr_doctor.description: CPR Doctor. Each night, protects one slot if that slot is attacked; if no blockable attack lands, the CPR attempt kills the target.

babysitter.description: Babysitter. Each night, protects one slot from a kill; if the Babysitter dies while protecting, the protected target dies too.

jailkeeper.description: Jailkeeper. Each night, jails one slot: the target is roleblocked and protected from non-Strongman kills through one submitted action.

roleblocker.description: Roleblocker. Each night, blocks one slot; that slot's roleblockable action does not resolve.

hooker.description: Hooker. Mafia-aligned roleblocker alias; blocks one roleblockable night action from the target.

jailer.description: Jailer. Mafiascum draft alias for a support roleblocker; blocks one roleblockable night action from the target.

mafia_roleblocker.description: Mafia Roleblocker. Mafia-aligned roleblocker alias; blocks one roleblockable night action from the target.

jack_of_all_trades.description: Jack of All Trades. Carries one-shot parity investigate, protect, block, and track choices.

catastrophic_roleblocker.description: Catastrophic Roleblocker. Blocks one slot and suppresses every submitted night action from that slot.

commuter.description: Commuter. Each night, commutes and becomes untargetable for the current resolution only.

tracker.description: Tracker. Each night, watches one slot and learns whom that slot visited. Sees the target unless the visitor's action is Ninja.

follower.description: Follower. Each night, follows one slot and learns the visible action type that slot performed.

watcher.description: Watcher. Each night, watches one slot and learns which visible actors visited that slot.

role_watcher.description: Role Watcher. Each night, watches one slot and learns the unique role keys of visible visitors, without learning identities.

role_guard.description: Role Guard. Each night, tells the chosen slot the unique role keys of visible visitors that targeted that slot, without revealing identities.

security_guard.description: Security Guard. Each night, tells the chosen slot which visible actors visited that slot, ignoring Ninja-hidden visitors.

odd_night_cop.description: Odd Night Cop. Parity investigation is allowed only on odd-numbered nights.

even_night_cop.description: Even Night Cop. Parity investigation is allowed only on even-numbered nights.

odd_cycle_cop.description: Odd Cycle Cop. Parity investigation is allowed only on odd-numbered game cycles.

even_cycle_cop.description: Even Cycle Cop. Parity investigation is allowed only on even-numbered game cycles.

weak_cop.description: Weak Cop. Dies when a Parity investigation returns scum.

lazy_cop.description: Lazy Cop. Cannot act when only one non-town player was alive at phase start.

loud_cop.description: Loud Cop. Emits a public loud notification when acting.

announcing_cop.description: Announcing Cop. Emits a public announcing notification when acting.

non_consecutive_cop.description: Non-consecutive Cop. Cannot target the same slot on consecutive nights.

indecisive_cop.description: Indecisive Cop. Cannot target the same slot two nights in a row.

cooldown_cop.description: Cooldown Cop. Must wait one matching night cycle after each Parity investigation.

uncooperative_cop.description: Uncooperative Cop. Receives setup-defined ambiguous feedback instead of ordinary town/scum detail.

roaming_cop.description: Roaming Cop. Cannot target the same slot more than once.

disabled_endgame_cop.description: Disabled Endgame Cop. Cannot act once the living player count is at or below three.

novice_cop.description: Novice Cop. Cannot use the Parity investigation until Night 2.

activated_cop.description: Activated Cop. Its Parity investigation is disabled until activated on Night 2.

compulsive_cop.description: Compulsive Cop. Must submit the Parity investigation each night.

vigilante.description: One-shot Vigilante. Carries a single night kill in this v1 constraint coverage role.

simultaneous_vigilante.description: Simultaneous Vigilante. May submit multiple personal night kills in the same night.

motion_detector.description: Motion Detector. Each night, checks whether a slot visibly visited or was visibly visited.

visitor.description: Visitor. Each night, makes a visible visit with no other effect; used by source-aware visit-history policies.

friendly_neighbor.description: Friendly Neighbor. Visits one target at night to confirm its town alignment socially; modeled as a visible no-state Visit action.

neighborizer.description: Neighborizer. Visits one target at night to add social neighborhood metadata outside the public thread.

mailman.description: Mailman. Sends an anonymous private message notice to one target at night.

observer.description: Observer. Sends a private observation result about one target at night.

reporter.description: Reporter. Sends a private report result about one target at night.

fruit_vendor.description: Fruit Vendor. Each night sends fruit as a private target notification with no persistent mechanical effect.

mason.description: Mason. Confirmed town private-chat member; setup declares a private mason channel for matching roles.

neighbor.description: Neighbor. Private-chat member with no alignment guarantee; setup declares a private neighbor channel for matching roles.

visitor_kill_target_visitor.description: Marked Visitor. Each night, makes a visible visit and carries the target-filter tag consumed by visitor-kill triggers.

traffic_analyst.description: Traffic Analyst. Each night, checks whether a slot had any visible folded visit history before this resolution.

bus_driver.description: Bus Driver. Each night, swaps two slots; actions aimed at one land on the other.

traffic_controller.description: Traffic Controller. Each night, rotates actions aimed at three or more submitted slots through that ordered target ring.

lightning_rod.description: Lightning Rod. Each night, pulls targetable actions to themselves.

redirector.description: Redirector. Each night, retargets actions aimed at the first target to the second target.

mafia_goon.description: Mafia Goon. Carries out the nightly factional kill (one per night, faction-shared).

encryptor.description: Encryptor. Mafia-aligned passive role: while alive, enables faction day chat for mafia members.

lost_mafia_goon.description: Lost Mafia Goon. Counts as mafia but may submit the factional kill only when no other mafia are alive.

recluse_mafia_goon.description: Recluse Mafia Goon. Counts as mafia but may submit the factional kill only when every living mafia teammate is also Recluse.

framer.description: Framer. Each night marks one slot as framed; a same-night Parity investigation reads that target as scum.

lawyer.description: Lawyer. Each night marks one slot as lawyered; a same-night Parity investigation reads that target as town.

poisoner.description: Poisoner. Each night marks one slot as poisoned; unresolved poison kills on the next night unless cured.

poison_doctor.description: Poison Doctor. Each night cures one poisoned slot before pending poison death resolves.

arsonist.description: Arsonist. Douses slots with a persistent mark, then ignites all slots doused before the current resolution.

cleanser.description: Cleanser. Each night removes an arson douse mark before a later ignite can read it.

godfather.description: Godfather. Carries out the factional kill and appears town to a Parity investigation: the godfather effect tag drives an investigation_overrides result flip.

ninja.description: Ninja. Carries out the factional kill; the kill is hidden from track/watch/investigate (Ninja modifier on the action).

serial_killer.description: Serial Killer. Independent night killer; wins only as the sole surviving faction.

strongman.description: Strongman. Carries out the factional kill; the kill bypasses Protect (Strongman modifier on the action).

mafia_janitor.description: Mafia Janitor. Carries out a night kill whose death flip is concealed by the pack death_reveal policy.

flipless_townie.description: Flipless Townie. Dies normally, but the death flip is concealed by the pack death_reveal policy.

alignment_only_townie.description: Alignment-only Townie. Dies normally, but the death flip reveals alignment while keeping role private.

motivator.description: Motivator. Grants a target one extra action as a private generated capability.

inventor.description: Inventor. Grants a target one single-use item as a private generated capability.

cultist.description: Cultist. Converted faction member used by deprogramming goldens.

cult_leader.description: Cult Leader. Converts a target into a Cultist while recording the target's original role/alignment for deprogramming.

disloyal_cult_leader.description: Disloyal Cult Leader. Uses a disloyal recruit that only resolves on cross-alignment targets.

deprogrammer.description: Deprogrammer. Restores a converted target to the first role/alignment recorded before conversion.

vanillaiser.description: Vanillaiser. Each night, mutates one slot into a Vanilla Townie while preserving their original role/alignment for later restoration.

vanillizer.description: Vanillizer. Alternate spelling of Vanillaiser using the same pack-owned vanillaize mutation action.

backup_cop.description: Backup Cop. Inherits the Cop role when a Cop dies in the same resolution.

universal_backup.description: Universal Backup. Chooses one source target and inherits that target's role if the source later dies.

vengeful.description: Vengeful. When killed, retaliates against the killing actor through the pack trigger table.

death_cursed_townie.description: Death-Cursed Townie. When killed by any death observation, retaliates against the death actor through the pack trigger table.

death_marker.description: Death Marker. Marks one target at night; the fresh effect mark is consumed by an EffectMarked trigger that kills the marked target.

phase_end_doomed_townie.description: Phase-End Doomed Townie. Carries a passive phase-boundary effect consumed by a PhaseEnd trigger.

win_witness_townie.description: Win Witness Townie. Carries a passive effect consumed by a Win trigger when ordinary faction win policy is about to fire.

unstoppable_vengeful_townie.description: Unstoppable Vengeful Townie. When killed, retaliates against the killing actor through a pack trigger whose produced kill carries Strongman.

super_saint.description: Super-Saint. When lynched, kills the execution-responsible voter through the pack trigger table.

beloved_princess.description: Beloved Princess. If lynched, prompts the host to skip the next day.

executioner.description: Executioner. Chooses a target; if that target is later lynched, the Executioner wins independently.

condemner.description: Condemner. Chooses a target; if that target is later lynched, the Condemner wins independently.

paranoid_gun_owner.description: Paranoid Gun Owner. Kills each visitor through the pack trigger table.

selective_visit_killer.description: Selective Visit Killer. Kills only visitors carrying the visitor_kill_target tag through the pack trigger table.

cupid.description: Cupid. Links two slots as lovers; if either dies in a later resolution, the linked partner dies of lover suicide.

hunter.description: Hunter. Chooses a target; if the Hunter dies in a later resolution, that target is killed by the armed retaliation.

hider.description: Hider. Each night, hides behind one host: direct targeting of the Hider is blocked when the host is non-mafia, and the Hider dies if the host dies.

precedence.notes: A Block prevents the blocked slot's roleblockable action from resolving. Only abilities whose action carries roleblockable=true are stopped; the Roleblocker's own Block is not roleblockable. Block is the highest-priority interaction and is evaluated before targets are read by the blocked action.
Redirect (bus drive) rewrites target maps before Kill/Protect/Investigate read their targets. A roleblocked bus driver does not swap. Resolved under RedirectPolicy with loop_cap.
Doctor's Protect saves the target from a Kill, UNLESS the killing action carries the Strongman modifier. A roleblocked doctor does not protect.

A Kill removes the target from play unless stopped by Block (roleblocked killer) or Protect (doctored target). Strongman is handled by protect_beats_kill's unless_modifiers, which removes Protect from this Kill's blocked_by at evaluation time.
